feedback.details: Mermaid syntax is valid and renders without errors. C4Context syntax is properly formed with correct element declarations.

Diagram contains only 4 software systems instead of required 7. Missing: 'Local Models Qwen', 'Local Models Nemotron', 'Frontier API (OpenAI/Anthropic)', 'Nomad Cluster'. 'Orchestration' (line 63) is not the required 'Nomad Cluster'. The diagram is fundamentally incomplete.

While Persons use Person_Ext (correct), the System 'LlmSwitch' (line 58) lacks a context boundary box. C4 requires the system to be enclosed in a visible boundary. Software Systems use Container_Ext which is acceptable but incomplete without the 4 missing systems.

Only 6 of 10 required relationships exist. Wrong labels: line 65 uses 'Sends LLM requests' (should be 'HTTPS API'), line 66 uses 'Deploys & manages system' (should be 'Deployment'), line 67 uses 'Exports metrics via HTTP' (should be 'Metrics Export'), line 68 uses bidirectional arrow '<->' (should be '->' for 'Service Discovery'), line 69 uses 'Gets secrets via AppRole' (should be 'Secrets Management'). Missing relationships to Local Models and Frontier API.

Narrative lacks required section references. Line 111 mentions 'User Journey' (generic) but contract requires exact phrases: 'Developer Journey' (a), 'Operations Journey' (b), and 'API Backend Specific Requirements' (c). None appear verbatim in the document.
LlmSwitch is correctly depicted as a black-box system with no internal components shown. No routing algorithm, cache, or sub-components are exposed.

Has H1 heading (line 6), fenced Mermaid block (lines 51-73), and >250 words of explanatory text. Minor deduction for not using exact 'C1: System Context' format but using 'C1 System Context: LlmSwitch' instead.

4 of 6 relationships lack protocol labels: line 65 'Sends LLM requests' (missing HTTPS), line 66 'Deploys & manages system' (missing Deployment), line 69 'Gets secrets via AppRole' (missing HTTPS), line 71 'Health check requests' (missing HTTP). Contract requires explicit protocol on ALL relationships.

No context boundary exists around LlmSwitch. Lines 51-73 show no Boundary() element or $c4ContextBoundary configuration. The system is floating unbounded, violating C4 fundamental principle that the context diagram must show system boundaries. This is a fundamental architectural failure.

overall_summary: This C1 System Context diagram fails catastrophically against the sprint contract. It is missing 4 of 7 required software systems (Local Models Qwen, Local Models Nemotron, Frontier API, Nomad Cluster) and substitutes 'Orchestration' instead. Only 6 of 10 required relationships exist, all with incorrect labels. The context boundary (mandatory for C4) is completely absent. Protocol annotations are missing on 4/6 relationships. The narrative fails to reference the required PRD sections verbatim. While the Mermaid syntax is valid and the markdown structure is present, the diagram is fundamentally incomplete and cannot serve as a valid System Context diagram. This is not a passing deliverable.
